case_title: BD THAKOR DBA BRISTOL HOTEL VS. RECHELLE CHAPLAIN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BD THAKOR DBA BRISTOL HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAPLAIN, RECHELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 50 MASON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102-UNIT 308, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $26.66 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BD THAKOR DBA BRISTOL HOTEL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BD THAKOR DBA BRISTOL HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPLAIN, RECHELLE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BD THAKOR DBA BRISTOL HOTEL SERVED OCT-01-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPLAIN, RECHELLE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPLAIN, RECHELLE
